name: sharp_softmax_scale01_exp030
hypothesis: AMPLIFY the weak-but-real read discrimination (exp029 PROVEN: value position rises to top 9% after training, but read stays ~95% uniform -> weak signal below the recall threshold). Replace the linear within-window retrieval with a SHARP SOFTMAX content-addressable read (scale=0.1, 113x sharper than exp028's sqrt(K)=11.3 which gave logits ~0.02 -> uniform -> recall 0). At scale=0.1, the ~0.3-0.5 value-score elevation becomes a DOMINANT softmax peak -> one-hot value selection -> recall. Direct comparison to exp028 (same config P=64 seq_len=64, scale=sqrt(K), tokacc 0.27 recall 0). Success=ANY recall>0 (first in 30 experiments). Risk: sharp read on near-uniform init scores picks noise -> may destabilize; watch tokacc curve.
